sources.cleaned_content:
Q²M IRON WHEELCLEANER REDEFINED

Exterior / maintenance

Strong and effective dedicated wheel cleaner

Q²M Iron WheelCleaner REDEFINED is a dedicated wheel cleaner designed to remove grime, dirt and brake dust from all types of wheels and finishes. Its gel based formula clings strongly to the surface, allowing effective cleaning while remaining safe for coated and uncoated rims.

Product Image: https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2024/01/productmain_1700x1645px_q2m_iron-wheel-cleaner_1000_500_2023-1024x991.png

Effective wheel cleaner with increased brake dust removal functionality.

Q²M Iron WheelCleaner REDEFINED combines strong wheel cleaning power with the ability to remove ferrous contamination. It simplifies wheel maintenance by dissolving brake dust and embedded particles without damaging delicate finishes.

Benefits:
- LOW ODOUR
- INSTANT ACTION
- SUITABLE FOR ALL WHEELS

What makes Q2M IRON WHEELCLEANER REDEFINED so special?
- Removes brake dust and heavy wheel contamination
- Gel formula clings to surfaces for effective cleaning

TECHNICAL DETAILS

Product Image: https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/860x640q2mironwheelcleanerredefined.webp

CAPACITIES: 500 ML / 1000 ML / 4000 ML
PH LEVEL: NEUTRAL
Consumption: 100ml/car

HOW TO USE Q²M IRON WHEELCLEANER REDEFINED

1. Spray Q²M Iron WheelCleaner REDEFINED onto cool wheels.
2. Allow the product to dwell and react with contamination.
3. Agitate gently with a brush if needed.
4. Rinse thoroughly with water.
5. Do not allow the product to dry on the surface.

FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS

Q: Is Q²M Iron WheelCleaner REDEFINED safe for ceramic coated wheels?
A: Yes. It is safe for coated and uncoated wheels.

Q: Does it remove iron contamination?
A: Yes. It removes ferrous deposits while cleaning wheels.

Q: Can it be used on all wheel finishes?
A: Yes. It is safe for all common wheel types.

Q: Does it need agitation?
A: Light agitation helps with heavy contamination.

Q: Is it suitable for regular maintenance?
A: Yes. It is suitable for routine wheel cleaning.

Best wheel cleaner. period.
A dedicated and highly effective cleaner for all types of wheels and finishes. The powerful formula was developed to efficiently remove grime, dirt, and brake dust. Safe on rotors, brake calipers, ceramic coatings, and carbon ceramic brakes.

STRONG COLOR-CHANGING EFFECT
The strong coloring effect of a substance is a very accurate indicator of how much pollution it has accumulated and how much work awaits the product. The coloring itself, unlike other manufacturer's products, is focused solely on this function and in no way translates into the product's performance, though it serves as an illustration to users.

BEST PRACTICE & PRO TIPS
Make the most out of your wheel wash routine with Q²M Iron Wheel Cleaner. It has a gel consistency that clings to the surface extremely well, loosening and dissolving dirt particles. The 'IRON' in its name stands for its great ability to remove ferrous deposits without losing the typical wheel cleaner character of the product.
TIP: Always use Q²M Iron Wheel Cleaner on a cool wheel and avoid direct sunlight. Spray liberally on the wheel and brake caliper, let it dwell for 1 to 2 minutes, and then rinse heavily.

STRONG AND EFFECTIVE DEDICATED WHEEL CLEANER

A dedicated and highly effective cleaner designed for all types of wheels and finishes. The powerful formula has been redefined to efficiently remove grime, dirt, and brake dust.

SAFE & EFFICIENT: Q²M Iron WheelCleaner Redefined features a gel consistency that clings to the surface exceptionally well, loosening and dissolving dirt particles. The term "IRON" in its name reflects its remarkable ability to eliminate ferrous deposits without compromising the typical characteristics of a wheel cleaner. This potent cleaner is safe for all types of rims and finishes, whether coated or not. Its formula makes it an ideal solution for cleaning and maintaining wheels without any risk of damaging their finish.

REDEFINED: Introducing our REDEFINED line – at GYEON, we’ve elevated our renowned chemical formulas to a new level. Meticulously reworked and refined, they deliver unmatched performance, exceptional durability, and utmost ease of use. Our commitment is to provide our customers with the best user experience possible.

BEST PRACTICE AND PRO-TIPS FROM YVES HEYLEN: Always use Q²M Iron WheelCleaner Redefined on a cool wheel and avoid direct sunlight. Liberally spray it on the wheel and brake caliper, letting it dwell for 1 to 2 minutes before rinsing heavily. TIP: For even more cleaning power, agitate Q²M Iron WheelCleaner Redefined with your favorite wheel brush or mitt.

CONSUMPTION: 100ml/car
PH LEVEL: NEUTRAL

FAQ:

Q: What's the difference between Iron Wheel and regular Iron Remover?
A: The iron wheel cleaner has a gel-like consistency that adheres to vertical surfaces and wheel spokes more effectively. It is formulated to clean road grime and all contaminants that accumulate on the wheels. Regular iron remover is gentler and can be used on surfaces such as PPF.

Q: Is it safe on all surfaces?
A: Indeed, Iron Wheel Cleaner is safe on all wheel finishes, whether powder-coated, aluminum, painted, etc. It's also safe on rotors, brake calipers, ceramic coatings, and carbon ceramics.

Q: Can I use this on tires?
A: It won't hurt, but it's not formulated to clean as well as Gyeon Tire Cleaner, which is designed to strip tire browning instead of brake dust.

Q: Anything I should be aware of?
A: Always use Gyeon Iron Wheel Cleaner on cool surfaces. The reason is, you don't want the product to evaporate before it can chemically react with the iron fillings to bleed them off. It does have a 'funky' smell, but don't worry, it's not toxic.

GYEON - Q²M Iron Wheel Cleaner

Rating: 8 reviews
Brand: GYEON

Gyeon Q2M Iron Wheel Cleaner is an intensive wheel cleaner with added iron fallout capabilities. Q2M Iron Wheel Cleaner is safe for use on all wheel types.

Pricing:
- 500ml: £13.00 (£10.95 inc. vat) - Stock: 20+
- 1 Litre: £22.00 (£16.45 inc. vat) - Stock: 20+
- 4 Litre: £74.00 (£49.95 inc. vat) - Stock: 2

In Stock. Order now for delivery on Tuesday, 10th February. (Select Next Day Delivery at checkout.)

Gyeon Iron Wheel Cleaner Redefined

Gyeon Q2M Iron Wheel Cleaner Redefined is a powerful wheel cleaner with added iron fallout remover capabilities. The gel consistency allows it to cling to the surface well, increasing its cleaning power. Not only will this wheel cleaner remove iron, but also brake dust and general dirt and grime. GYEON Iron Wheel Cleaner is safe for use on all types of wheels, coated or uncoated thanks to its pH-neutral formula.

Key Features:
- Unmatched Cleaning Power: Effectively removes iron particles (commonly known as "iron fallout") that embed themselves deep within wheel surfaces.
- Safe on All Wheel Finishes: Suitable for use on a wide range of wheel materials, including painted, chrome, powder-coated, and even delicate anodized finishes.
- Quick and Easy Application: Simply spray on, allow to dwell, and rinse off for a dramatic transformation.
- pH Neutral: Gentle on wheel surfaces while effectively removing stubborn contaminants.
- Concentrated Formula: Offers exceptional value and long-lasting cleaning power.

How To Use Gyeon Q2M Iron Wheel Cleaner Redefined:
1. Prepare the Wheels: Ensure the wheels are cool to the touch.
2. Apply the Cleaner: Spray the cleaner evenly and generously onto the entire wheel surface.
3. Dwell Time: Allow the cleaner to dwell for 1-5 minutes, depending on the severity of contamination. Observe the cleaner as it reacts with the iron particles, causing them to turn a vibrant purple. If necessary, use a wheel brush to agitate. Do not allow the wheel cleaner to dry on the surface.
4. Rinse Thoroughly: Rinse the wheels thoroughly with water using a high-pressure washer or a garden hose with a strong spray nozzle.
5. Dry and Admire: Dry the wheels with a clean microfibre cloth to prevent water spots.

Gyeon Iron Wheel Cleaner is available in: 500ml, 1L & 4L

Frequently Asked Questions – GYEON Q²M Iron Wheel Cleaner

Q: What are iron particles?
A: Iron particles are microscopic fragments of iron that become embedded in your wheels due to brake dust and road grime. Over time, these can bond to the surface and cause corrosion or staining if not removed.

Q: Is GYEON Iron Wheel Cleaner Redefined safe on all wheel finishes?
A: Yes. GYEON Q²M Iron Wheel Cleaner Redefined is safe on painted, chrome, powder-coated, and anodized finishes. Its pH-balanced formula ensures effective decontamination without damaging delicate surfaces.

Q: How often should I use GYEON Iron Wheel Cleaner Redefined?
A: For optimal results, use it every 2–4 weeks as part of your regular wheel care routine. Frequency can vary based on driving conditions and brake dust build-up.

Q: What makes GYEON Iron Wheel Cleaner Redefined different from other wheel cleaners?
A: GYEON's advanced iron-dissolving chemistry breaks down stubborn brake dust at a molecular level while remaining safe on all wheel types. The formula features a colour-change reaction to show active cleaning, combining performance with ease of use.

We Say:
Gyeon Iron Wheel Cleaner Redefined is an absolute game-changer for wheel maintenance. We’ve tried countless wheel cleaners, but this product stands out. Its advanced formula tackles brake dust, iron deposits, and stubborn grime effortlessly, leaving wheels looking brand new with minimal effort. The color-changing reaction is not just visually satisfying but also reassures you that the product is working at a chemical level.

Unlike generic cleaners, Gyeon’s cleaner is safe for all types of wheel finishes, including painted, polished, and anodized surfaces, giving you peace of mind during every application. What we love most is how effective it is without requiring heavy scrubbing, saving both time and energy. Whether you’re a car enthusiast or just someone who cares about maintaining your vehicle’s appearance, this product is a must-have in your detailing arsenal.

Key Features:
- Agitation Required: No
- Dilutable: No
- Cleaning Strength: 10/10

Description:
Gyeon Iron Wheel Cleaner Redefined is the ultimate solution for restoring the brilliance of your wheels with minimal effort. Designed for professional-grade results, this advanced cleaner combines exceptional cleaning power with iron removal capabilities to target the toughest contaminants, including brake dust, iron deposits, and road grime. Its innovative, pH-balanced formula ensures compatibility with all wheel finishes, including painted, polished, powder-coated, and anodized surfaces, making it a versatile choice for car enthusiasts and detailers alike.

Engineered for ease of use, Gyeon Iron Wheel Cleaner requires minimal scrubbing while delivering exceptional results. Its thick, gel-like consistency clings to surfaces, ensuring longer dwell times and deeper cleaning action. For heavily soiled wheels, a light brush agitation is all that’s needed to achieve a showroom-quality shine.

Beyond its cleaning capabilities, Gyeon Iron Wheel Cleaner helps maintain the integrity of your wheels, reducing the risk of long-term damage caused by corrosive contaminants. By removing embedded particles and grime, it ensures your wheels remain in top condition and free from discoloration or pitting.

Specification:
- Agitation Required: No
- Chemical Basis: Acid-based (neutralised)
- Cleaning Strength: 10
- Dilutable: No
- Maximum Dwelling Time: 5 minutes
- Removes Inorganic Contaminants: Yes
- Removes Organic Contaminants: Yes
- Safe For All Wheel Types: Yes
- Strips Coatings: No
- Strips Sealants And Waxes: Yes (partially)

How To Use:
1. Prepare the Wheels: Ensure the wheels are cool to the touch. Rinse thoroughly with water to remove loose dirt and debris.
2. Apply the Cleaner: Spray Gyeon Iron Wheel Cleaner evenly over the entire wheel surface, including hard-to-reach areas like the spokes and inner barrel.
3. Let It Dwell: Allow the cleaner to work for 2-4 minutes. The formula will react with iron contaminants, changing color to indicate it’s breaking them down.
4. Agitate (if needed): For heavily soiled wheels, use a soft detailing brush or microfibre wheel mitt to gently agitate stubborn grime.
5. Rinse Thoroughly: Use a high-pressure water spray to rinse off the cleaner and contaminants, ensuring no residue is left behind.
6. Inspect and Repeat: If necessary, repeat the process for extremely dirty wheels.

Pro Tip: For best results, follow up with a wheel protection product to keep your wheels cleaner for longer. Always test on an inconspicuous area before first use and avoid using on hot wheels or direct sunlight.

Revolutionize Wheel Cleaning with Unmatched Power and Safety!

Wheels are one of the most challenging areas to clean, constantly exposed to brake dust, road grime, and ferrous deposits. GYEON Q²M Iron WheelCleaner REDEFINED is here to make wheel cleaning effortless and effective. This advanced gel-formula cleaner clings to surfaces, loosening and dissolving dirt, brake dust, and iron particles while remaining safe for all types of wheels—coated or uncoated.

Part of GYEON’s REDEFINED line, this product represents the next evolution in wheel cleaning. With a reworked and refined formula, it delivers unmatched performance, exceptional durability, and an unparalleled user experience. Whether you’re a professional detailer or a car enthusiast, Q²M Iron WheelCleaner REDEFINED ensures your wheels stay spotless and protected without compromising their finish.

Why Choose GYEON Q²M Iron WheelCleaner REDEFINED?
- Powerful Cleaning: Dissolves brake dust, ferrous deposits, and road grime with ease.
- Safe for All Wheels: Works on all rim types and finishes, including coated wheels.
- Gel Formula: Clings to surfaces for maximum dwell time and cleaning power.
- REDEFINED Performance: Enhanced formula for superior results and ease of use.

Features:
- Gel-based formula for superior surface adhesion
- Removes brake dust, iron particles, and stubborn dirt
- Safe for all wheel types, including coated and uncoated finishes
- Part of GYEON’s REDEFINED line for unmatched performance

Specification:
- Coverage: 100ml / car
- pH: Neutral

How To Use:
1. Ensure the wheels are cool and out of direct sunlight.
2. Shake the bottle of GYEON Q²M Iron WheelCleaner REDEFINED well before use.
3. Spray the product liberally onto the wheel surface, including the brake calipers.
4. Allow the cleaner to dwell for 1-2 minutes, letting it dissolve dirt and ferrous deposits.
5. For heavily soiled areas, agitate with a wheel brush or mitt for extra cleaning power.
6. Rinse thoroughly with water to reveal a clean, spotless finish.

Pro Tip: For best results, use GYEON Q²M Iron WheelCleaner REDEFINED as part of your regular wheel maintenance routine. Pair it with GYEON Q²M Iron for a complete decontamination process, ensuring your wheels are free of both surface dirt and embedded contaminants.

Available Sizes: 500ml, 1 Litre & 4 Litres
